reviews.comment:
Conforme.no le pongo 5 estrellas por la falta de playeros.por la pandemia.por eso se forma fila y de ahí demoras en la carga de combustible.pero sino sería un 5

(Translated by Google)
I'm satisfied. I'm not giving it 5 stars because of the lack of attendants due to the pandemic. That's why there are lines and delays in refueling. Otherwise, it would be a 5.
